credentials.client_id: 填写华为 AppGallery Connect client_id
credentials.client_secret: 填写华为 AppGallery Connect client_secret

huawei.base_url: 填写华为 AppGallery Connect API 根地址
huawei.token_path: 填写 token 接口路径
huawei.upload_path: 填写文件上传接口路径
huawei.release_path: 填写应用提交接口路径
huawei.task_state_path: 填写任务状态接口路径
huawei.detail_path: 填写应用详情接口路径
